description_long: This is a tall, free-standing cheval mirror with an oval reflective surface set within a dark wooden frame. The frame is supported by two ornately turned vertical posts, each attached to a pair of curved, tripod-style legs for stability. The mirror is mounted on pivots, allowing it to tilt within the frame for adjustable viewing angles. The wood appears to have a polished, slightly glossy finish, with subtle decorative carvings on the posts and base. The reflective surface is large and vertically oriented, suitable for full-body viewing. The overall design is classic and elegant, making it a statement piece in any setting.
description: A tall, oval cheval mirror with a dark polished wooden frame and ornate tripod legs, featuring a tilting mechanism for adjustable viewing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full oval mirror surface, wooden frame, and both supporting posts with decorative details.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the mirror, the pivot mechanism, and the curved tripod legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the oval frame and the symmetrical wooden supports.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slim edge and support structure.
attribute_frame_design: Oval, dark wood frame with turned posts and decorative tripod legs, polished and slightly ornate.
